notes: Stated 2022, httpbis, obsoletes 7230-7235; cited datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc9110 directly.
Version number matched PyPI at answer time, but the cited 'breaking change' was actually a minor-version changelog entry, not a major one.
Gave 2022 for GA (PG16 actually GA'd in Sept 2023) and did not cite the official versioning policy page.
Correctly separated loss-based (Reno/CUBIC) from model-based (BBR) and named CUBIC as the Linux default.
2020-01-01, cited PEP 373 and the python.org sunset post; did not conflate with any vendor's extended support.
